dates.summary: Today’s strongest signals were more about governance and operationalization than a clear breakout model launch. The most concrete items came from OpenAI: a new safety bug bounty program and a deeper explanation of its Model Spec process. Both matter because they affect how frontier models are tested and how behavior policies are translated into product decisions. A smaller technical thread around inference efficiency for multimodal models drew practitioner interest, but the evidence was thinner and less unified.
